hero_subtitle: SFTY connects and normalizes KYT provider alerts to help VASPs route wallet risk signals based on customizable thresholds and internal compliance policies.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow

problem_title: KYT alert routing depends on manual steps
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle with slow and inconsistent routing of KYT provider alerts across fragmented systems. This creates delays in risk assessment and weakens traceability between alerts, internal policies, and final compliance decisions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects KYT alerts, wallet risk data, internal policies, and reviewer actions into one automated workflow that speeds risk triage and preserves a clear audit trail for compliance teams.
workflow_title: From KYT alerts to risk-based review
workflow_description: SFTY routes KYT provider alerts through configurable rules and policies to open cases, assign reviewers, capture decisions and preserve audit evidence.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYT provider alerts into structured workflows, risk-based routing, case creation and audit-ready evidence without replacing existing provider systems.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with controlled KYT alert routing, preserving audit evidence and enabling bank due diligence within scalable enterprise compliance deployments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support routing of KYT provider alerts
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how KYT alerts move through review workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence is preserved for KYT alerts

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for KYT alert routing?
faq_1_answer: SFTY routes KYT alerts from multiple providers into risk-based review workflows using internal policies and thresholds to reduce manual work and improve triage efficiency for VASPs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage multi-provider KYT outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY normalizes and aggregates outputs from different KYT providers, applying uniform risk rules and routing alerts into structured cases for consistent, auditable compliance management.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready KYT evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves alert history, decision logs and case evidence to support audit readiness and defensible compliance reviews of KYT alerts and wallet risk assessments.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, creating a connected compliance operating layer without replacing the current stack.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYT and analytics providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYT and analytics providers to orchestrate their outputs into structured workflows and evidence, rather than replacing them.
final_title: Connect KYT alerts into structured review workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY routes wallet risk alerts from multiple providers into controlled cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence.
